summary: Comprehensive testing of Quote ↔ Service Task auto-linking feature for Konekt B2B platform. Backend: 10/10 core tests passed (100%). All API endpoints working correctly. Frontend: Admin Service Tasks page renders correctly at /admin/service-tasks with filter tabs and task list. Admin Orders page regression test passed - no blank data.

integration_issues.issue: AdminQuotes.js component with Type and Task columns exists but is not used in routes. Current route uses QuotesRequestsPage which shows items but without Type/Task columns.

action_items: Consider updating admin quotes route to use AdminQuotes.js component which has Type and Task columns in detail modal, or add these columns to QuotesRequestsPage
critical_code_review_comments: Quote ↔ Service Task linking working correctly - POST /api/admin/service-tasks/from-quote-line creates task and links to quote
Pricing engine correctly applies 30% margin: partner_cost=50000 → selling_price=65000
Quote line auto-update working: effective_cost, unit_price, total, service_task_id, cost_source all set correctly
Duplicate task prevention working - returns 409 Conflict for same quote line
Partner data isolation verified - partner submit-cost response does NOT contain selling_price or margin
Admin visibility verified - admin can see both partner_cost and selling_price/margin
Quote totals recalculation working after cost propagation
Admin Service Tasks page at /admin/service-tasks renders correctly with filter tabs (All, Awaiting, To Review, In Progress, Completed, Overdue)
Admin Orders page regression passed - 259 orders showing with proper data

success_rate.frontend: 95% (Service Tasks page working, Orders page working, Quotes detail modal missing Type/Task columns)

test_credentials: Admin: admin@konekt.co.tz / KnktcKk_L-hw1wSyquvd!, Partner: demo.partner@konekt.com / Partner123!
seed_data_creation: Created test quotes with service lines during testing - prefixed with 'Test Customer V252'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quote ↔ Service Task auto-linking fully verified. Backend APIs all working. Admin Service Tasks page at /admin/service-tasks working with 20 tasks. Rate limiting is active (10 logins per 5 min) - restart backend to clear if needed. AdminQuotes.js component exists with Type/Task columns but is not used in routes.

backend_endpoints: POST /api/admin/quotes-v2 - Creates quote with service-type line items
POST /api/admin/service-tasks/from-quote-line - Creates task from service line, rejects product lines, prevents duplicates
PUT /api/partner-portal/assigned-work/{task_id}/submit-cost - Triggers pricing engine, propagates to quote, returns only partner_cost (no selling_price/margin)
GET /api/admin/quotes-v2/{quote_id}/linked-tasks - Returns linked tasks with task_ref, line_index, partner, status, cost
GET /api/admin/quotes-v2/{quote_id} - Returns quote with updated line items (effective_cost, unit_price, service_task_id, cost_source)
GET /api/admin/service-tasks/{task_id} - Admin sees partner_cost, selling_price, margin_pct, margin_amount
GET /api/admin/service-tasks - Returns list of all service tasks
GET /api/admin/service-tasks/stats/summary - Returns task counts by status
GET /api/admin/orders-ops - Returns orders with proper data (no blank data)
GET /api/partner-portal/assigned-work - Partner sees tasks without selling_price/margin
frontend_features: Admin Service Tasks page at /admin/service-tasks with filter tabs (All 20, Awaiting 6, To Review 7, In Progress 4, Completed 0, Overdue 0)
Admin Service Tasks table with columns: Task, Service, Partner, Client, Cost, Status, Created
Admin Dashboard - Partner Response Pipeline widget with 6 Awaiting, 7 To Review pills and View Tasks CTA
Admin Orders page - 259 orders with proper data (Date, Order #, Customer, Payer, Total, Payment, Fulfillment)
